Industries We Serve

Trusted Across Sectors

Our rubber compounds power critical applications across five major industries, both domestically and internationally.

Plumbing & Bathware

Seals, gaskets, and O-rings for leak-proof plumbing systems.

Automobile

Transmission seals, bushings, and vibration dampening components.

Home Appliance

Durable rubber parts for washing machines, refrigerators, and more.

Electrical

Insulation components for high-performance applications.

Oil & Gas

Chemical-resistant seals for harsh environments.

Why Rubix Rubber

Engineering Resilience Since 2005

Based in Mumbai, India, we manufacture every compound in-house with zero outside dependence — from raw material to finished product.

100% In-House Manufacturing
Complete control from compounding to cutting — no subcontracting.
15+ Specialized Compounds
From general-purpose SBR to high-performance AFLAS.
Rapid Sample Dispatch
Test before you commit — samples dispatched within the same week.
Export Ready
Serving clients across Asia, Europe, and the Americas.

Need a Custom Compound?

We specialise in custom rubber formulations. Tell us your requirements and our team will engineer the perfect solution.
